hero.body: Curated catering and unforgettable event experiences designed for extraordinary moments across Saudi Arabia.
hero.band: Luxury Events  ·  Weddings  ·  Corporate  ·  Private Dining

intro.label: Introduction
intro.headline: Complete event packages,
intro.body1: At Elie Catering and Event Planning, we specialize in delivering complete event packages from A to Z. From creative concepts to flawless execution, we handle every detail — exclusive accessories, gourmet food, elegant flowers, fine chocolates and exquisite decorations.
intro.body2: Our high-standard packages ensure that your event is not only memorable but also one-of-a-kind — blending luxury, creativity and precision at every turn.

story.body: From first consultation to final candle — every detail considered, every moment crafted to endure.

vision.p1: To be the premier provider of luxury catering and event planning services globally, setting the standard for elegance, creativity, and flawless execution.
vision.p2: We redefine excellence at every occasion — from intimate private gatherings to grand royal ceremonies — across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and beyond.
vision.missionBrand: At Elie Catering and Event Planning,
vision.missionP1: we craft extraordinary events that exceed our clients' expectations — delivering innovative culinary masterpieces, exquisite décor, and seamless event management.
vision.missionP2: We are dedicated to creating memorable experiences that celebrate life's most significant moments with sophistication and unparalleled service.

values.sub: Five core principles that guide our craft, ensuring every event we produce is a masterpiece of luxury and precision.

items.d: We strive for perfection in every detail, from planning to execution.
Creativity and fresh ideas are at the heart of everything we do.
We specialize in curating high-end experiences that exude sophistication and elegance.
Trust and transparency are the foundation of our client relationships.
Every event is uniquely tailored to reflect our clients' visions and preferences.
Delicate and sophisticated bite-sized treats for elegant receptions
Premium coffee and refreshments for seamless event interludes
Interactive culinary experiences where our chefs cook fresh before your guests
High-end grilled specialties crafted with the finest meats and ingredients
Authentic Eastern flavors and exquisite Italian dishes by master chefs
Fresh, premium seafood and artfully prepared vibrant sushi rolls
Authentic Arabian hospitality and specialty coffee served with elegance

elite.sub: Elevate your event with our curated premium services.

items.d: Cinematic coverage of your event's finest moments.
Curated performers tailored to your event's atmosphere.
Transforming venues into immersive luxury environments.
Seamless, professional valet service for your guests.

closing.quote: "We believe in creating extraordinary experiences where luxury meets impeccable craft."

booking.sub: Tell us about your vision — we will reach out within 24 hours to craft something extraordinary together.
booking.name: Full Name
booking.messagePh: Tell us about your vision, theme, special requests, or anything else we should know…
booking.disclaimer: We respond within 24 hours. All enquiries are handled with complete discretion.
booking.successBody: Our team will be in touch within 24 hours to begin planning your event.

whyUs.sub: Choosing Elie Catering means selecting a partner who understands every nuance of crafting unforgettable events.

pillars.d: One producer from first call to last candle. No vendor seams, no coordination gaps — just one voice carrying your vision from concept to execution.
Chefs, florists, service — trained under one roof, to one standard.
Institutional knowledge you can only build by doing this for a long time. We've seen every scenario — and built systems for each one.

expertise.d: Years of experience delivering excellence in event management.
Luxury in every detail — from concept to the final presentation.
Every event built from a blank page — crafted exactly for you.
Seasonal menus by the chef's notebook. No dish served twice the same.
One timeline, one standard. The seams between vendors disappear.
Named farmers, decade-long suppliers, staff trained in-house.

clientsReach.body: We proudly extend our premium services to the most distinguished clientele across the Kingdom and beyond.
clientsReach.note: Covering all regions of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia — our specialized team is fully equipped to handle high-profile events with immediate readiness and unmatched professionalism.

ourServices.headline: Our Services
ourServices.tagline: Elie Catering & Event Planning — Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

about.heroSub: A luxury event house born in Riyadh, dedicated to moments that endure.
about.storyP1: Elie Catering & Event Planning was founded with a singular vision: to bring world-class luxury hospitality to the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. What began as a dream has grown into the region's most trusted name in bespoke event experiences.
about.storyP2: Every event we create is a reflection of our unwavering commitment to excellence — from the first consultation to the final flourish. We blend culinary artistry, meticulous planning, and inspired décor into moments that endure long after the last guest departs.
about.pillarsSub: We are architects of atmosphere — every element conceived, coordinated, and crafted under one roof.

pillars.d: Our culinary team, decorators, and planners operate under one roof — ensuring seamless coordination from concept to close.
No two events are alike. Every menu, every arrangement, every detail is tailored to your unique vision and preferences.
Whether ten guests or a thousand, our standards never waver. Every event receives the same white-glove dedication.

about.founderQuote: "Luxury is not about expense. It is about the invisible effort behind every flawless moment."
about.founderBio: With over 14 years shaping the event landscape of Saudi Arabia, Elie has cultivated a philosophy rooted in precision and beauty. His approach — part culinary director, part creative visionary — sets the tone for every experience the brand delivers.

milestones.d: Elie Catering launches with a focus on intimate luxury events and bespoke dining experiences.
First major corporate contracts, bringing our luxury standard to KSA's top enterprises.
Expanded services to include complete event planning, décor, and floral design in-house.
Events delivered across 12 cities in Saudi Arabia and the wider Gulf region.
Celebrated a landmark of over 500 events executed with flawless precision and luxury.

about.ctaBody: Tell us your vision — we will handle every last detail.
